title: Khalilullah
promptText: What title is given to Prophet Ibrahim?
explanation: Ibrahim is remembered for intimate closeness to Allah and deep trust in Him.

title: Hanif
promptText: What did Ibrahim model in worship?
answerText: Being a hanif, turning away from shirk to pure tawhid.
explanation: His example is pure monotheism and refusal of idolatry.

title: Broken Idols
promptText: What did Ibrahim do to the idols of his people?
answerText: He showed they had no power and called people to worship Allah alone.
explanation: The story exposes false gods and the weakness of shirk.

title: Cool Fire
promptText: What happened when Ibrahim was thrown into the fire?
answerText: Allah made it cool and safe for him.
explanation: Allah protected Ibrahim and turned a punishment into a sign.

title: Building the Kaaba
promptText: Who built the Kaaba with Ibrahim?
explanation: Father and son raised the House of Allah together in Makkah.

title: Accepted Work
promptText: What dua did Ibrahim make after building the Kaaba?
answerText: He asked Allah to accept the work and raise a messenger among the descendants.
explanation: The prayer links worship, future guidance, and the coming of the Prophet Muhammad.

title: Zamzam
answerText: Allah provided water for Hajar and Ismail in the valley of Makkah.
explanation: The well became a sign of Allah's mercy and provision.

title: Running Between Hills
promptText: Which action of Hajar is remembered in Sa'i?
answerText: Her search for water between Safa and Marwah.
explanation: Sa'i preserves the memory of trust, effort, and divine care.

title: Sacrifice Test
promptText: What was Ibrahim asked to do in the great test?
answerText: Sacrifice his son in obedience to Allah.
explanation: The story shows complete submission before Allah's command.

title: Glad Tidings
promptText: What children were given to Ibrahim?
explanation: Both sons become part of a lasting prophetic legacy.

title: Prayer for Descendants
promptText: What kind of family did Ibrahim ask Allah for?
answerText: A family that keeps prayer and remains righteous.
explanation: His dua asks for worship, steadiness, and moral strength across generations.

title: Lasting Legacy
promptText: What is the lasting lesson of Ibrahim's family?
answerText: Faith, sacrifice, patience, and pure monotheism.
explanation: Their story is a model of steadfast belief passed through generations.
